ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Type of the school (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the performance metrics apply to */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the performance metrics */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "percent_passing_math" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "percent_passing_reading" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate (average of math and reading passing rates) */,
  "num_students_tested" INTEGER /* Number of students tested */,
  "standard_deviation_math" REAL /* Standard deviation of math scores */,
  "standard_deviation_reading" REAL /* Standard deviation of reading scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_details" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the budget applies to */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "funding_source" INTEGER /* Source of funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "expenditures" TEXT /* Detailed expenditures in JSON format */,
  "num_students_funded" INTEGER /* Number of students for whom the budget is allocated */,
  "funding_allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was allocated */,
  "funding_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_details_funding_source FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_details_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, educator, researcher) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, budget) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the educational program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget allocated for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_programs_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budget_details ("budget_id")
)
